# HaarPSI source

- Upstream project: https://www.math.uni-bremen.de/cda/HaarPSI/
- Source file: https://www.math.uni-bremen.de/cda/HaarPSI/software/haarPsi.py
- Retrieved: 2026-06-24
- License: MIT, reproduced in `LICENSE`
- Authors: Rafael Reisenhofer; Python conversion by David Neumann

The upstream file is vendored without functional changes so benchmark results
remain attributable to the authors' published Python/NumPy implementation.
